name: Milindkumar Patel
title: Web Development Manager
summary: .NET Web/Application Developer with 5+ years of strong experience in all stages of advanced Development. Knowledgeable in the user interface, testing, and debugging processes. Bringing forth expertise in design, installation, testing and maintenance of systems. Equipped with diverse and promising skillset. Proficient in as assortment of technologies, including AWD BPM, SSIS, ASP.NET, .NET CORE Restful API, IBM BPM, JavaScript (Angular), and Microsoft SQL Server. Able to effectively self-manage during independent projects, as well as collaborate in the team setting. Familiarity with Agile Scrum methodology.

experience.title: Web Development Manager
bullets: Lead and mentor a cross-functional team of web developers, setting technical direction, delivery standards, and code-quality practices across all web application projects.
Own the end-to-end software delivery lifecycle — from requirements and architecture through deployment and post-release support — for secure, mission-critical systems.
Partner with business stakeholders to translate strategic goals into actionable technical roadmaps, prioritized backlogs, and measurable delivery milestones.
Drive adoption of modern web technologies and engineering best practices, including CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and structured code reviews.
Oversee Azure cloud infrastructure, release management, and application security, championing best practices for remediation and compliance.
Manage resourcing, hiring, and performance development to build a high-performing, collaborative engineering team.

experience.title: Lead Developer
bullets: Worked in highly collaborative operations team to streamline the process of implementing security confidential Azure cloud environment and introduced best practices for remediation.
Involved in setting up and configuring Microsoft Azure and AWS cloud computing platform components.
Creating code drops/patches for deployment in pre-production and production environment for applications within secure system.
Co-ordinate with external team members and other stake holders to understand the impact of their changes to complete release work.
Performing code merge activities for different ASP.NET C# applications.
Helping developers to resolve any technical issue, troubleshooting, project Risk and Issue identification and management.
Analyze functional requirements and provide design solution with latest .NET framework with MS SQL database.

experience.title: .NET Developer
bullets: Involving in agile methodology and undergone in all phases of software development life cycle and proposed solution to the business problem.
Design the automation process and SQL jobs to generate the data, based on the Rabbit MQ integration.
Leverage latest technologies to Design and Developed web application with Angular 11 and .NET 5 integration.
Involved in updating the Telerik Kendo UI controls for building the application enabling to focus on value generating development tasks.
Involved in setting up and configuring Microsoft Azure cloud computing platform components.
Involved in designing the stored procedure with SQL Triggers to set up the Audit log in the system.

experience.title: Engineer, Engineering Distribution
bullets: Frequently interact with Product Owners and Scrum Master to understand user stories and workflow before construct or update the process flows through AWD BPM tool.
Design the automation process for data filtering through XML logics and Mobius Document Direct.
Leverage modern framework and tool like .NET for the backend to build world class user interface for custom application.
Involved in creating multiple parameterized stored procedure which were used by the reports to get the data.
Worked on SSIS package. DTS import-export for transferring data from SQL server to desired client-side location for further extraction.
created SSIS Reusable Packages to extract data from Multi formatted Flat files, Excel, XML files into SQL Server.

experience.title: Developer
bullets: Working closely with business analysts to identify data requirements through blueprints for each activity in the process diagrams (Visio Diagrams)
Providing analysis and design for automating the business process using IBM BPM 8.5 Tool.
Leverage modern JavaScript frameworks such as Angular and ASP.NET Core for the backend to build world-class user interface for a web application.
Developing BPD on the business request and deploy in the testing environment.
Testing workflow and validation of BPD, performing positive and negative tests and comparing expected results with testing result logs (Manual testing and Automated testing)

experience.title: Sr. Software Developer
bullets: Worked as a productive and positive team member to design, code, test, report, and debug operations.
Served in a Client-facing role translating business requirements into viable and scalable solutions.
Developed School ERP software to help schools to plan how to use their resources and manage processes effectively and efficiently. Reducing back-office work by creating the automation process.
Assist in scope definition, planning, estimation and tracking of API Development and Application Development.
Train and mentor junior IT Members and lead the team to ensure that business value is maximized and IT goal achieved.
